asciidoc.antora.enableAntoraSupport.depr: This setting has been replaced by `#asciidoc.antora.showEnableAntoraPrompt#` and no longer has any effect.
asciidoc.antora.showEnableAntoraPrompt.d: Show a prompt to enable [Antora](https://antora.org/) support when an antora.yml file is detected.
asciidoc.antora.title: Antora
asciidoc.asciidoctorpdf_command.deprecat: This setting has been replaced by `#asciidoc.pdf.asciidoctorPdfCommandPath#` + `#asciidoc.pdf.asciidoctorPdfCommandArgs#` and no longer has any effect.
asciidoc.common.title: General
asciidoc.debug.title: Debug
asciidoc.debug.trace.desc: Enables debug logging for this extension.
asciidoc.debug.trace.deprecationMessage: This setting no longer has any effect. The extension now logs to the **Asciidoctor** output channel; control the verbosity with the **Developer: Set Log Level…** command.
asciidoc.disableAntoraSupport.title: Disable Antora support in this workspace
asciidoc.editor.enableDrop.desc: Enable drag and drop to insert images. Hold down Shift key to drop file into the text editor.
asciidoc.editor.drop.copyIntoWorkspace.d: Controls whether dropping an image that is not already reachable from `imagesdir` (or the current Antora module) offers to copy it into the project.
asciidoc.editor.drop.copyIntoWorkspace.s: Offer to copy the image into the project when it cannot be linked cleanly from its current location.
asciidoc.editor.drop.copyIntoWorkspace.n: Never copy; always insert a link to the image where it currently is.
asciidoc.editor.paste.enabled.desc: Enable inserting an image when pasting an image file or a bitmap (e.g. a screenshot) into the editor.
Controls whether pasting an image copies it into the project. A pasted bitmap (e.g. a screenshot) is always copied; a pasted image file is copied only when it is not already reachable from `imagesdir` (or the current Antora module).
Copy a pasted bitmap, or a pasted image file that cannot be linked cleanly from its current location.
Never copy; only insert a link when pasting an image file, and do nothing when pasting a bitmap.
asciidoc.editor.title: Editor
asciidoc.enableAntoraSupport.title: Enable Antora support in this workspace
asciidoc.enableErrorDiagnostics.deprecat: This setting has been replaced by `#asciidoc.debug.enableErrorDiagnostics#` and no longer has any effect.
asciidoc.exportAsPDF.title: Export Document as PDF
asciidoc.extensions.enableKroki.desc: Enables Kroki extension to generate diagrams.
asciidoc.extensions.kroki.serverUrl.desc: URL of the Kroki server used to render diagrams (e.g. `http://localhost:8000` for a self-hosted instance). Leave empty to use the public `https://kroki.io` server. A `kroki-server-url` attribute set in the document header or in an `.asciidoctorconfig` file takes precedence over this setting.
asciidoc.extensions.registerWorkspaceExt: Enables Asciidoctor.js extensions registration from the workspace directory `.asciidoctor/lib`.
asciidoc.extensions.title: Extensions
asciidoc.pasteImage.title: Paste Image (Deprecated)
asciidoc.pdf.asciidoctorPdfCommandArgs.d: List of arguments, for instance: `-a`, `pdf-themesdir=resources/themes`, `-a`, `pdf-theme=basic`. Please note that the argument key and value should be added separately. In other words, adding `-a pdf-theme=basic` is invalid! It should be `-a` (key) and `pdf-theme=basic` (value) added as two entries. By default, it passes the following arguments: `--quiet` and `--base-dir` with the full directory path to the AsciiDoc document.
asciidoc.pdf.asciidoctorPdfCommandPath.d: External `asciidoctor-pdf` command to execute. It accepts a full path to the binary, for instance: `/path/to/asciidoctor-pdf`. If the value is empty, use `asciidoctor-pdf` or, if not available, `bundle exec asciidoctor-pdf` (from the extension global storage).
asciidoc.pdf.engine.desc: Controls the PDF engine used to export as PDF.
asciidoc.pdf.outputDirectory.desc: Directory where the exported PDF is written. When empty, the PDF is saved next to the AsciiDoc document. A relative path is resolved against the workspace folder (or the document directory when there is no workspace); the `${workspaceFolder}` variable is also supported. The directory is created if it does not exist. The exported file keeps the document name with a `.pdf` extension.
asciidoc.pdf.askOutputLocation.desc: Ask for the output location every time a PDF is exported. When disabled, the PDF is written directly to `#asciidoc.pdf.outputDirectory#` (or next to the document) without prompting, overwriting any existing file. Useful for a quick save-and-regenerate iteration cycle.
asciidoc.pdf.title: PDF
asciidoc.pdf.wkhtmltopdfCommandArgs.desc: List of arguments, for instance: `--orientation`, `Landscape`. Please note that the argument key and value should be added separately. In other words, adding `--orientation Landscape` is invalid! It should be `--orientation` (key) and `Landscape` (value) added as two entries. By default, it passes the following arguments: `--enable-local-file-access`, `--encoding`, `utf-8`, `--javascript-delay`, `1000`, `--footer-center` (if enabled) and `cover` (if it has a cover page).
asciidoc.pdf.wkhtmltopdfCommandPath.desc: External `wkhtmltopdf` command to execute. It accepts a full path to the binary, for instance: `/path/to/wkhtmltopdf`. If the value is empty, use either `wkhtmltopdf` on Linux/macOS or `wkhtmltopdf.exe` on Windows.
asciidoc.preview.asciidoctorAttributes.d: Sets Asciidoctor attributes used in the preview. Attributes need to be written as an object of type {string: string}.
asciidoc.preview.attributes.deprecationM: This setting has been replaced by `#asciidoc.preview.asciidoctorAttributes#` and no longer has any effect.
asciidoc.preview.attributes.desc: **Deprecated**: Set attributes to be used in the preview. Attributes need to be written as an object of type {string: string}.
asciidoc.preview.doubleClickToSwitchToEd: Double click in the preview to switch to the editor.
asciidoc.preview.fontFamily.desc: Controls the font family used in the preview.
asciidoc.preview.fontSize.desc: Controls the font size in pixels used in the preview.
asciidoc.preview.lineHeight.desc: Controls the line height used in the preview. This number is relative to the font size.
asciidoc.preview.markEditorSelection.des: Marks the current editor selection in the preview.
asciidoc.preview.openAsciiDocLinks.depre: This setting has been replaced by `#asciidoc.preview.openLinksToAsciidocFiles#` and no longer has any effect.
asciidoc.preview.openAsciiDocLinks.desc: **Deprecated**: Controls how clicking on links to AsciiDoc files is handled in the preview.
asciidoc.preview.openAsciiDocLinks.inEdi: Try to open links in the editor
asciidoc.preview.openAsciiDocLinks.inPre: Try to open links in the preview
asciidoc.preview.openLinksToAsciidocFile: Controls how links to other AsciiDoc files in the preview should be opened.
Try to open links in the editor
Try to open links in the preview
asciidoc.preview.preservePreviewWhenHidd: Whether to keep the AsciiDoc preview in memory even when it's hidden (such as when switching tabs). If enabled, the preview will reload more quickly when restored from the background at the expense of increased memory usage. This setting only affects a hidden/background AsciiDoc preview; closing the preview will always discard it entirely, regardless of this setting.
asciidoc.preview.refresh.title: Refresh Preview
asciidoc.preview.refreshInterval.desc: Interval in milliseconds between two consecutive updates of the preview. The value 0 means it will only update the preview on save.
asciidoc.preview.scrollEditorWithPreview: When the preview is scrolled, updates the view of the editor.
asciidoc.preview.scrollPreviewWithEditor: When the editor is scrolled, updates the view of the preview.
asciidoc.preview.defaultStyle.desc: Controls which built-in stylesheet is used when `#asciidoc.preview.style#` is empty and the document does not set `stylesheet`/`stylesdir`.
asciidoc.preview.defaultStyle.vscode.des: Use the VS Code theme-integrated preview stylesheet.
asciidoc.preview.defaultStyle.antora.des: Use the Antora-inspired stylesheet based on the Asciidoctor default stylesheet.
asciidoc.preview.style.desc: An URL or a local path to CSS style sheets to use from the preview. Relative paths are interpreted relative to the folder open in the Explorer. If there is no open folder, they are interpreted relative to the location of the AsciiDoc file. On Windows, when editing `settings.json` by hand, escape `\` as `\\` (the Settings UI does this for you). When left empty, the preview falls back to the document's `stylesheet`/`stylesdir` attributes.
asciidoc.preview.additionalStyles.desc: A list of URLs or local paths to CSS style sheets that are layered on top of the preview style (the default Asciidoctor stylesheet or the one set in `#asciidoc.preview.style#`), instead of replacing it. The style sheets are applied in order, after the base style, so they take precedence and let you tweak the preview while keeping the defaults. Relative paths are interpreted relative to the folder open in the Explorer. If there is no open folder, they are interpreted relative to the location of the AsciiDoc file. All `\` need to be written as `\\`.
asciidoc.preview.templates.desc: List of local paths to directories holding custom templates to use from the preview. Relative paths are interpreted relative to the folder open in the Explorer. If there is no open folder, they are interpreted relative to the location of the AsciiDoc file. A `.asciidoctor/templates` directory found at the root of a workspace folder is picked up automatically, mirroring `.asciidoctor/lib` for extensions. All `\` need to be written as `\\`.
asciidoc.preview.title: Preview
asciidoc.preview.toggleLock.title: Toggle Preview Locking
asciidoc.preview.useEditorStyle.desc: Uses VS Code editor style instead of the default Asciidoctor style.
asciidoc.preview.useEditorStyle.deprecat: This setting has been replaced by `#asciidoc.preview.defaultStyle#`.
asciidoc.previewSide.title: Open Preview to the Side
asciidoc.saveDocbook.title: Save to DocBook
asciidoc.saveHTML.title: Save HTML Document
asciidoc.showLockedPreviewToSide.title: Open Locked Preview to the Side
asciidoc.showPreview.title: Open Preview
asciidoc.showCheatSheet.title: Open AsciiDoc Cheat Sheet
asciidoc.showSource.title: Show Source
asciidoc.toggleBold.title: Toggle Bold
asciidoc.toggleItalic.title: Toggle Italic
asciidoc.toggleMonospace.title: Toggle Monospace
asciidoc.trace.deprecationMessage: This setting has been replaced by `#asciidoc.debug.trace#` and no longer has any effect.
asciidoc.trace.desc: **Deprecated**: Enables debug logging for the AsciiDoc extension.
asciidoc.useWorkspaceRoot.deprecationMes: This setting has been replaced by `#asciidoc.useWorkspaceRootAsBaseDirectory#` and no longer has any effect.
asciidoc.useWorkspaceRoot.desc: **Deprecated:** When in a workspace, uses the workspace root path as the base directory.
asciidoc.useWorkspaceRootAsBaseDirectory: **Advanced.** Sets Asciidoctor's base directory to the workspace root instead of letting it derive from the current file's directory. Enable this only if your documents reference includes or images by paths relative to the workspace root rather than to the current file (for example a shared `docs/_includes/` folder addressed the same way from every file). When enabled, *every* include/image path in the top-level document — including one that targets a file in the same folder — must be written relative to the workspace root, and `{docdir}` resolves to the workspace root (it cannot be used to reach a sibling of the current file); includes inside an already-included file are still resolved relative to that file. Leaving it disabled (the default) is recommended: an explicit base directory is a known footgun that can break relative includes. Applies to the preview, to HTML/DocBook export, and to PDF export.

This setting is deprecated and will be removed in a future release. Use an `.asciidoctorconfig` file to share a folder across documents instead. See the [migration guide](https://docs.asciidoctor.org/vscode-extension/asciidoctorconfig/#migrate-from-base-directory).
asciidoc.use_asciidoctorpdf.deprecationM: This setting has been replaced by `#asciidoc.pdf.engine#` and no longer has any effect.
asciidoc.use_asciidoctorpdf.desc: **Deprecated**: Use `asciidoctor-pdf` instead of the integrated renderer.
asciidoc.use_kroki.deprecationMessage: This setting has been replaced by `#asciidoc.extensions.enableKroki#` and no longer has any effect.
asciidoc.use_kroki.desc: **Deprecated:** Enables Kroki integration to generate diagrams.
asciidoc.wkhtmltopdf_path.deprecationMes: This setting has been replaced by `#asciidoc.pdf.wkhtmltopdfCommandPath#` + `#asciidoc.pdf.wkhtmltopdfCommandArgs#` and no longer has any effect.
description: Provides rich language support for AsciiDoc.
